# Karpathy — nanoGPT

**Source:** https://github.com/karpathy/nanoGPT
**License:** MIT
**Snapshot date:** 2026-05-04
**Commit:** 3adf61e154c3fe3fca428ad6bc3818b27a3b8291
**Vendored subset:** model.py, train.py, sample.py, bench.py, configurator.py, config/, data/ (config + data utilities), scaling_laws.ipynb, transformer_sizing.ipynb, README.md, LICENSE

Origin: production-quality reference for the GPT decoder-only architecture from Karpathy's "Let's build GPT" Lecture 7. The pedagogical companion repo (\`karpathy/ng-video-lecture\`) has no LICENSE and cannot be vendored — it stays as a Reference link in Sprint 7.

Original work © Andrej Karpathy. See \`LICENSE\` in this folder.
